databaseExplorer.intro: Browse databases, schemas, and tables in a hierarchical view.
databaseExplorer.noResultsBody: No schema or table matches the current filter.
databaseExplorer.emptySchema: Drag a table here or create a new one.

rename.title: Rename {table}
rename.errorMessage: A table with this name already exists in the same schema.

schema.title: New PostgreSQL schema
schema.invalidMessage: Schema already exists or the name is invalid.

reset.title: New empty project
reset.message: Create a new empty project? Current data will be removed.

databaseModel.title: Database
databaseModel.subtitle: Model the full database: metadata, schemas, and extensions.

schema.title: New PostgreSQL schema
schema.invalidMessage: Schema already exists or the name is invalid.
schema.renameUnavailableMessage: Make sure the new name is valid and not duplicated.
schema.deleteMessageWithTables: {count} linked tables will be moved to a fallback schema.
schema.deleteMessageWithoutTables: The schema will be removed from the database.

extension.title: New PostgreSQL extension
extension.invalidMessage: Extension already exists or the name is invalid.

tableEditor.selectHintBody: Select a table from explorer or canvas to start editing columns and relations.
tableEditor.title: Table editor
tableEditor.subtitle: Complete metadata and column definition.
tableEditor.emptyBody: When you select a table you can edit columns, types, and relations in detail.

relationManager.title: Relations
relationManager.subtitle: Define foreign keys from the selected table.
relationManager.emptyRelations: No outgoing relations from the selected table.

tableList.title: Tables
tableList.subtitle: {schemaCount} schemas | {tableCount} tables in {databaseName}
tableList.emptyBody: Add a new table from the toolbar to get started.

inspector.title: Inspector
inspector.relationsEmptyBody: Open a table from Explorer or Canvas to create and edit relations.

newTable.label: New table
newTable.description: Create a new table in the primary schema.

newSchema.label: New schema
newSchema.description: Add a PostgreSQL schema to the database.
newSchema.title: New schema

layoutSql.label: Layout: focus sql
layoutSql.description: Maximize inspector and open the SQL editor.

fitCanvas.label: Canvas: fit all
fitCanvas.description: Fit the canvas viewport to show all tables.

centerCanvas.label: Canvas: center selected
centerCanvas.description: Center the canvas on the selected table.

toggleTheme.label: Toggle theme
toggleTheme.description: Switch between light and dark theme.

shared.applyTemplateMessage: The current project will be overwritten.
shared.newProjectMessage: This will remove all tables, relations, schemas and editor state.
shared.invalidSchemaMessage: Schema already exists or the name is invalid.
shared.templateMessage: The current project will be overwritten.

canvas.intro: Drag tables and visualize foreign key links.
canvas.emptyBody: Create at least one table to start modeling your PostgreSQL schema visually.
canvas.templateApplyMessage: The current project will be overwritten.

warnings.fallbackColumn: Table {qualifiedName} has no valid columns. Added fallback column 'id'.
warnings.noStatements: No compatible SQL statements were found in the file.

sqlGenerator.adminStep: 1) Run CREATE DATABASE using an admin connection.
sqlGenerator.connectionStep: 2) Connect to the created database and run the transactional section.

sequelizeScaffold.readmeHeader: TypeScript scaffolding generated in real time by SQL Canvas.
